content.full_text:
May 11, 1992

Ms. Carla Wardlow
Acting Chief
Technical Assistance and Analysis Division
Fair Political Practices Commission
P.O. Box 807
Sacramento, CA 95804

RE: COMMITTEE TO EDUCATE AGAINST VOUCHERS
CONSOLIDATION OF CAMPAIGN STATEMENTS

Dear Carla:

This letter is sent to request permission for the consolidation of campaign statements pursuant to Government Code § 84205.

Our client, the Committee to Educate Against Vouchers, is a committee which is primarily formed to oppose the qualification and passage of a school voucher initiative. The deadline for filing the petitions for this initiative is May 28, 1992.

Thus, under the statutory filing requirements, the Committee is required to file the following reports:

Qualification Report Covering 1/1/92 - 6/11/92
Due 6/18/92

Semi-Annual Report Covering 6/12/92 - 6/30/92
Due 7/31/92

We request permission to file a consolidated statement covering the period 1/1/92 through 6/30/92 which would be filed by 7/31/92.

Thank you for your attention to this request.

Sincerely,

OLSON, CONNELLY, HAGEL, FONG & LEIDIGH

DIANE M. FISHBURN
DMF/ccz

The image shows a yellow post-it note with handwritten text on it. The text appears to be in cursive and reads "Adrian."
